biological_replicate: S. cerevisiae strains BY4741 and W303
technical_replicate: quantitatively compared their proteomes by LC-MS following peptide stable isotope dimethyl labeling (n = 3)
experimental_design: we exemplarily demonstrate its high potential by analyzing the effects of mitochondrial gene deletions
